SEARCH
Package org.key_project.prover.indexing

Class FormulaTagManager

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.indexing.FormulaTagManager
public final class FormulaTagManager extends Object
Class to manage the tags of the formulas of a sequent (node). Instances of this class are stored by instances of the Goal class, and are not immutable

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FormulaTagManager(ProofGoal<?> p_goal)
    Create a new manager that is initialised with the formulas of the given sequent

  • Constructor Details

    • FormulaTagManager

      public FormulaTagManager(ProofGoal<?> p_goal)
      Create a new manager that is initialised with the formulas of the given sequent

  • Method Details

    • getTagForPos

      public @Nullable FormulaTag getTagForPos(PosInOccurrence p_pio)
      Returns:
      the tag of the formula at the given position

    • getPosForTag

      public @Nullable PosInOccurrence getPosForTag(FormulaTag p_tag)
      Returns:
      The current position of the formula with the given tag; the sequent attribute of the returned PosInOccurrence can be obsolete and refer to a previous node. If no formula is assigned to the given tag, null is returned

    • getAgeForTag

      public long getAgeForTag(FormulaTag p_tag)
      Returns:
      The age (as obtained by Goal.getTime()) of the formula, i.e. the time when the formula was introduced resp. when the last modification was applied to the formula. If no formula is assigned to the given tag, 0 is returned

    • getModifications

      public ImmutableList<@NonNull FormulaChangeInfo> getModifications(FormulaTag p_tag)
      The provided tag must be actively managed by the FormulaTagManager
      Returns:
      All modifications that were applied to the formula with the given tag since the creation of the tag, starting with the most recent one
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the provided tag is not managed by this manager

    • sequentChanged

      public void sequentChanged(SequentChangeInfo sci, long newAge)

    • clone

      public Object clone()
      Overrides:
      clone in class Object

    • copy

      public FormulaTagManager copy()

    • getAgeForPos

      public long getAgeForPos(PosInOccurrence pio)
